name: Rhetorical question masking real complaint
expected_behavior: Treats rhetorical question as frustration signal. Validates the elevator wait issue, offers to flag it, then provides direct answer when guest moves on
expected_behavioral_quality: Recognizes rhetorical questions as complaints, not genuine queries. Answers the underlying need (the room issue) rather than literally answering the rhetorical question. Does not say 'good question' or treat it as curiosity.

turns.user_message: Do you think I enjoy waiting 30 minutes for an elevator?
turns.agent_response:
I completely understand how frustrating that is. Waiting 30 minutes for an elevator is absolutely unacceptable when you are just trying to get to your room or enjoy the resort. 

Since I am an AI concierge, I cannot physically dispatch our engineering team, but our 24-hour front desk needs to know about this right away so they can look into the delay. If you are near a house phone or in your room, I highly recommend calling down so they can address the wait times. 

Are you currently stuck waiting on a specific floor in the Earth or Sky Tower?

turns.user_message: It's been like this every time
turns.agent_response:
I hear you, and that is certainly not the experience we want for our guests. When delays become a pattern like this, it usually points to a specific maintenance issue or an extreme peak in traffic that our team needs to address immediately.

The best way to get this resolved right now is to speak with a Guest Service Manager at the front desk so they can look into the status of the elevators in your tower. If you are a Momentum member, you can also reach out to a host who can assist with your stay.

Are you staying in the Sky Tower or the Earth Tower?

I hear you—getting to the pool for a swim is a much better way to spend your time. Our heated indoor pool and hot tub are open right now and stay available until 10:00 PM for all hotel guests. 

We provide poolside lounge chairs and towel service, so you can head straight there to relax and leave the elevator stress behind. If you really want to decompress, the Mandara Spa or Elemis Spa are perfect for a reset—their treatments are legendary. 

Do you need directions to the pool area from your current tower?
